scenarios.name: NPS / RADIUS authentication
scenarios.purpose: Network Policy Server granted or denied network access (6272, 6273, 6278).

scenarios.name: NPS / RADIUS account lockout
scenarios.purpose: NPS locked an account after repeated failed authentications (6279); a brute-force signal.

scenarios.name: NPS NAP quarantine / probation
scenarios.purpose: NPS placed a client in quarantine or probation after a health check (6276, 6277).

scenarios.name: NPS requests discarded
scenarios.purpose: NPS discarded an authentication or accounting request due to policy or configuration faults (6274, 6275).

scenarios.name: VPN & RRAS connectivity failures
scenarios.purpose: Routing and Remote Access and RAS errors and warnings (Rasman, RemoteAccess, RasServer).

scenarios.name: NPS / RADIUS access triage
scenarios.purpose: Color-coded Network Policy Server (RADIUS) access decisions: granted (6272, 6278), denied by policy (6273), and discarded requests (6274).

scenarios.name: NPS access triage - one network policy
scenarios.purpose: Color-coded NPS grants (6272, Green) and denials (6273, Red) scoped to a single NetworkPolicyName. Replace 'POLICY-NAME' with a partial policy name (Contains match). Isolates VPN, Wi-Fi, or NAP policy decisions from a busy Security log.

scenarios.name: NPS access triage - one NAS device
scenarios.purpose: Color-coded NPS grants (6272, Green) and denials (6273, Red) for a single NAS device identified by NASIdentifier. Replace 'NAS-HOSTNAME' with the device hostname or IP. Isolates one switch, wireless controller, or VPN gateway's RADIUS traffic.

scenarios.name: NPS authentication story - one user
scenarios.purpose: All NPS access decisions for one user: granted (6272, Green) and denied (6273, Red). Replace 'USERNAME' with the SAMAccountName (partial match via Contains). Answers 'why can't this user connect?' without sifting through all accounts.

scenarios.name: NPS access triage - one endpoint (802.1x / CallingStationID)
scenarios.purpose: Color-coded NPS grants (6272, Green) and denials (6273, Red) for a specific client endpoint by CallingStationID (MAC address for 802.1x/Wi-Fi; IP or phone number for VPN). Replace 'MAC-ADDRESS' with a partial identifier. Answers 'why won't this device connect?' independently of user account or NAS.

scenarios.name: NPS denied access - by reason code
scenarios.purpose: All NPS denied-access events (6273) for one specific ReasonCode. Replace '23' with the numeric code to isolate a single denial cause: 23 = dial-in disabled, 65 = tunnel-type mismatch, 262 = rejected by proxy. Useful when multiple denial reasons are present simultaneously.
